title: crotalaria cistoides
intro: Crotalaria cistoides, also known as the rock crotalaria or rock rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. The plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria cistoides include its use as a natural remedy for wounds, burns, and fungal infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce oxidative stress. Crotalaria cistoides is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses, although its efficacy and safety should be further researched and validated.
